--- "Miles Alexander, LSJ" littlestjames@yahoo.com
wrote:

Greetings

I have installed one set of tie downs. Once these
meet with your approval, I will install the balance.

The tie downs are solid and therefore have no
give, which tensions the screen. The raising chain
is secured with bungee cord which works at keeping
the chain off the walls.

The wind was at 18 mph when the images where
taken.

Please revert with comments.

Regards

Miles
